cardDescription: Deployment addresses for this instance. These are read at runtime, so changes apply without a redeploy.
serverBaseHelp: The address agents connect to, shown in the connect guide. Leave blank to use the value from the environment. Example: https://hub.example.com or http://192.168.0.18:48801
saveError: Could not save the server URL.
publicWebUrlHelp: Set in the environment (BETTER_AUTH_URL). Auth reads it at startup, so change it in your .env and restart, not here.
